RandomForest.model:
Pipeline(steps=[('preprocess',
                 Pipeline(steps=[('preprocess',
                                  ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('num',
                                                                   SimpleImputer(strategy='median'),
                                                                   ['temperature_celsius',
                                                                    'humidity',
                                                                    'wind_kph',
                                                                    'pressure_mb',
                                                                    'precip_mm',
                                                                    'cloud',
                                                                    'visibility_km',
                                                                    'pm2_5',
                                                                    'pm10',
                                                                    'no2',
                                                                    'so2', 'co',
                                                                    'o3',
                                                                    'year',
                                                                    'month',
                                                                    'day',
                                                                    'day_of_week',
                                                                    'day_of_year',
                                                                    'week_of_year',
                                                                    'quarter',
                                                                    'is_weekend'...
                                                                    'aqi_rolling_mean_14', ...]),
                                                                  ('cat',
                                                                   Pipeline(steps=[('imputer',
                                                                                    SimpleImputer(strategy='most_frequent')),
                                                                                   ('onehot',
                                                                                    OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore'))]),
                                                                   ['state',
                                                                    'area',
                                                                    'prominent_pollutants',
                                                                    'air_quality_status',
                                                                    'location_name',
                                                                    'season',
                                                                    'dominant_measured_pollutant'])]))])),
                ('randomforest',
                 RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=200, random_state=42))])
